work_package_result.summary: Added the provider-neutral M01 streaming runtime lifecycle, a deterministic scripted Rust fake and a Codex SDK 0.144.5 adapter with opaque continuation, scoped idempotent Stop, deadlines, safe failure normalization and bounded stale-stream cleanup.

passed: 6 Rust conformance tests cover ordered events, scoped Stop, virtual deadlines, opaque continuation, provider failure and malformed late events
29 Node tests cover the same shared fixture plus Codex normalization, safe defaults, unconsumed disposal, bounded dropped turns and stale-generation isolation
live exact-head canary: ChatGPT auth with SDK and CLI 0.144.5, first turn completed in 17453 ms and continuation completed in 12014 ms with sameThread true
mise exec -- just check passed repository, documentation, planning, Rust, Python, TypeScript and protocol gates at d8536b9
GitHub Fast Gate run 56 passed at d8536b9c08315f678e5bf584b96ae1db245223cd
protocol compatibility remained unchanged against origin/main and gross diff stayed within the explicit 3600-line budget
not_run: real Codex cancellation, timeout and malformed-event injection remain deterministic contract tests; the live canary intentionally exercises safe successful continuation only
durable session persistence, process crash recovery, desktop IPC and UI integration belong to WP-M01-005 through WP-M01-007

review.method: Detached read-only R2 review of the exact cumulative diff; two repair rounds closed all findings and the final closure review of d8536b9c08315f678e5bf584b96ae1db245223cd returned PASS.
findings_closed: Made unconsumed streams explicitly disposable and independently deadline-bounded so they cannot remain permanently active
Restored WP-M01-002 protocol accounting and marked WP-M01-004 correctly as a public port change without a Protobuf epoch change
Bound terminal writes to the exact ActiveTurn generation so stale streams cannot overwrite replacement turns after terminal-history eviction
Defaulted Codex to read-only with approvals, network access and web search disabled until a trusted policy binding explicitly overrides it

observability_changes: normalized events expose session, runtime-turn, sequence, safe progress, usage, terminal outcome and bounded provider correlation without prompt or raw provider errors
live canary reports only auth mode, exact versions, normalized event kinds, completion, same-thread evidence and latency
known_limitations: Codex is the only real M01 runtime; later providers and local models must implement the same descriptor and conformance boundary
terminal history and active generation state are bounded and process-local until WP-M01-005 persists authoritative project sessions
this package does not expose desktop IPC, persist conversation turns, route providers or execute trusted project mutations
